response.original_title: The Art of Making Money - A Very Thin Line
response.overview: Meet the Americans behind two alternative currencies: the originators of the community-focused BerkShares in Massachusetts, and the Fed-baiting libertarian Bernard von NotHaus, creator of the Florida-born Liberty Dollar. Neither party was happy with the status quo - but their strategies for disrupting the economy couldn't be more different.
response.title: The Art of Making Money - A Very Thin Line
